note: This is the Xero view. It diverges from the QuickBooks view starting in September because the Square payment feed has been broken since September 4 and the Stripe feed has been intermittent. See reconciliation_notes.json for the per-entry diff against QuickBooks.

summary.note: Xero shows YTD net of $10,864.00, which is $972.00 below the QuickBooks figure of $11,836.00. The full delta is explained by the September payment-feed gap. See reconciliation_notes.json.
